_comment: Single source of truth for known AI runtimes and MCP options. Both installer.py and picker.py read this. Add a runtime here (entrypoint is relative to $HOME) or drop a new ai-config/mcp/<id>.toml plus an entry below.

mcp.name: Serena
mcp.desc: 代码语义 / 符号导航

mcp.name: ADO Work Items
mcp.desc: 本机 Azure DevOps 工具

mcp.name: Lark / 飞书
mcp.desc: 飞书云文档 / 知识库读取

mcp.name: DuckDuckGo Search
mcp.desc: 免费网络搜索，无需 API Key
